The '''[[Petranaki/Legends|Petranaki]] scimitar''' was one of the five traditional [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] weapons that made up the Petranaki array.

The Petranaki scimitar was a light weight [[Sword/Legends|sword]] with a gently curving blade, which had been honed to razor-sharpness. It was generally considered the most useful and popular of the weapons in the Petranaki array due to its balance and cutting ability.

{{Weapon-stub}}
